title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!
